etymology.description: 直 (meaning "looking forward") + 心 (meaning "heart, mind") = combination representing an emotional or mental state associated with looking forward
etymology.interpretation: The character 𢛳 combines 直 (zhí, "looking forward") with 心 (xīn, "heart, mind") to depict an emotional or cognitive state of anticipation or forward-thinking. Although not used directly in the character 德 (dé, "virtue"), 𢛳 aligns with the notion of intention and mental focus within the context of virtue.
